case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CASSANDRA BUTTICCI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTTICCI, CASSANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET #410, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,292.00 RENT, $1,000.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,292.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.20 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTTICCI, CASSANDRA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDMENT FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT [CCP 664.6], POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT [CCP 664.6]
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTICCI, CASSANDRA DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTICCI, CASSANDRA
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTICCI, CASSANDRA
